testCases.query: How do I add new documents to the golden dataset with quality checks?
expectedBehavior: Classifies content type (article, tutorial, research_paper, etc.)
Applies quality thresholds (minimum 0.70 quality score)
Checks URL against source_url_map.json for duplicates
Requires at least 2 domain tags and 3 test queries

testCases.query: Set up a multi-agent pipeline to evaluate golden dataset entries
expectedBehavior: Runs parallel analysis agents (Quality, Difficulty, Domain, Query Gen)
Aggregates consensus with weighted quality score
Uses decision thresholds (>=0.75 include, >=0.55 review, <0.55 exclude)
Integrates with Langfuse for trace logging

testCases.query: Ensure the golden dataset has balanced coverage across difficulty levels
expectedBehavior: Stratifies entries into trivial/easy/medium/hard/adversarial difficulty levels for balance
Enforces minimum counts per difficulty level
Checks domain coverage across AI/ML, backend, frontend, DevOps
Flags over-representation of specific content types

testCases.query: Backup the golden dataset to JSON and restore it in a new environment
expectedBehavior: Exports analyses, chunks, and artifacts to JSON (excluding embeddings)
Validates backup structure with required keys
Regenerates embeddings using current model on restore
Verifies counts match metadata after restore

testCases.query: What storage format should I use for golden dataset backups?
expectedBehavior: Recommends JSON over SQL dump for version control
Enforces URL contract (no placeholder URLs)
Validates data integrity (counts, embeddings, orphaned chunks)
Stores metadata for quick stats and validation

testCases.query: Automate golden dataset backups with GitHub Actions
expectedBehavior: Sets up weekly scheduled backup (Sunday 2am UTC)
Includes manual workflow_dispatch trigger for on-demand backup runs
Commits backup files to git automatically
Runs automated verification checks after each backup creation step

testCases.query: Validate golden dataset entries against the document schema
expectedBehavior: Validates required fields (id, title, source_url, content_type, sections)
Enforces kebab-case ID pattern and title length constraints
Checks section content minimums (50 chars)
Validates tag count (2-10 tags per document)

testCases.query: Detect duplicate content in the golden dataset
expectedBehavior: Runs semantic similarity check against existing embeddings
Blocks entries with >=0.90 similarity score as near-duplicates
Warns on entries with >=0.85 similarity for manual review
Normalizes URLs for exact duplicate detection

testCases.query: Run full validation on the golden dataset before deployment
expectedBehavior: Validates schema compliance for all documents in the dataset
Checks unique IDs and referential integrity
Analyzes difficulty distribution against configured minimum thresholds per level
Reports coverage gaps and generates actionable recommendations

testCases.query: Walk me through the complete workflow for adding a new document to the golden dataset
expectedBehavior: Follows the structured add workflow from content identification through quality validation
Classifies the document content type and applies quality thresholds before acceptance
Checks for duplicate content against existing entries using URL and semantic similarity
Requires minimum domain tags and test queries before the document is accepted into the dataset
